chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N.D- 1226 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6109/2022 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.6110/2022 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 10.08.2023 Petitioner Dil Nawaz Mangrio in person Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Petitioner is Advocate himself and submits that he and his father are being harassed by Respondent No.5 / SIP Ali Akber Khokhar, who is famous for registering false FIRs and in Crime No.63 of 2022 of Police Station, Kandiaro, the Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate-III, Kandiaro had passed stricture against him vide order dated 31.03.2022. In any case, the petitioner submits that he may be provided protection against the harassment by the same police official. SIP Zulfiqar Ali, who is present on behalf of Respondent No.5 undertakes that petitioner would be provided legal protection in accordance with the law. This petition is, therefore, accordingly disposed of along with listed applications in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI Judge Judge ARBROHI
